title: FIFA 2026 Schedule — Key Matches, Dates & Venues
excerpt: Discover the ultimate FIFA 2026 World Cup schedule, including key matches, dates, and venues. Elevate your experience with VIP hospitality, private jet transfers, and Rolls Royce chauffeur services.
content:
## FIFA 2026: A Tournament Like No Other

The FIFA 2026 World Cup promises to be the most expansive and thrilling edition in history. With 48 teams competing across 16 host cities in the United States, Canada, and Mexico, the schedule is packed with must-see matches. For discerning fans, this is not just a tournament—it’s an opportunity to indulge in unparalleled luxury. Imagine watching the world’s best players from a VIP suite, arriving via private jet, and being chauffeured in a Rolls Royce. This guide breaks down the key matches, dates, and venues, ensuring you don’t miss a moment of the action.

## Key Match Dates and Venues

The FIFA 2026 schedule kicks off on June 8, 2026, with the opening match at the iconic Estadio Azteca in Mexico City. The group stage runs through June 26, featuring 72 matches across venues like MetLife Stadium (New York/New Jersey), SoFi Stadium (Los Angeles), and BC Place (Vancouver). The knockout rounds begin June 29, with the Round of 32 and Round of 16 hosted at premier stadiums such as AT&T Stadium (Dallas) and Mercedes-Benz Stadium (Atlanta). The quarterfinals are set for July 3-4, the semifinals on July 7-8, and the third-place match on July 11. The grand finale takes place on July 12 at MetLife Stadium, where the world champion will be crowned. For VIP guests, these dates are the perfect backdrop for a luxury getaway.

## VIP Hospitality: Beyond the Ordinary

To truly savor the FIFA 2026 World Cup, consider our exclusive VIP hospitality packages. From the moment you land, a private jet whisks you to your destination, bypassing crowded airports. Upon arrival, a Rolls Royce awaits to transport you to the stadium in style. Inside, you’ll enjoy premium seating, gourmet dining, and access to exclusive lounges. Whether it’s the high-stakes quarterfinals or the electric atmosphere of the final, our VIP service ensures every match is a memorable experience. Keywords like FIFA 2026 VIP hospitality and luxury World Cup packages are naturally integrated into your journey.

## Planning Your Luxury Itinerary

With matches spanning three countries, planning is key. Our concierge team assists with seamless logistics, from private jet charters to Rolls Royce transfers between venues. For example, you could watch the opening match in Mexico City, then fly to Los Angeles for a semifinal, all while enjoying five-star accommodations. The FIFA 2026 schedule offers flexibility to create a custom itinerary. Don’t miss the group stage showdowns featuring powerhouses like Brazil, Germany, and Argentina. Each venue offers its own charm, from the vibrant streets of Toronto to the desert luxury of Las Vegas (Allegiant Stadium).

Attending the FIFA 2026 World Cup is a once-in-a-lifetime event, and our VIP hospitality elevates it to new heights. The combination of private jet travel and Rolls Royce chauffeur service ensures every moment is effortless and opulent. Whether you’re a seasoned traveler or a first-time attendee, our packages are designed for those who demand the best. Keywords like luxury World Cup and FIFA 2026 VIP are not just terms—they’re promises.
